name: MutualConnectionCounter

neutralConcepts: Full recompute from adjacency lists on every invocation — NEVER delta (++/--)
Same inputs always produce same count — idempotent by algorithm
Output: mutualCount (number only) — no list of shared user IDs

ironRules.rule: Full recompute from adjacency lists on every invocation — NEVER read stored mutualCount and increment/decrement. Delta increment drifts under queue retries = BUILD_FAILURE
Output is mutualCount (number) only — no array of shared user IDs (data retention violation)
Idempotent by algorithm: same adjacency lists always produce same count regardless of retry count

keywords: mutual connection counter T80 full recompute never delta idempotent adjacency intersection
